commands.review_summary:
Adds configurable server-side Gateway WebSocket keepalive that pings post-auth clients, closes unresponsive sockets with code 4000, and updates gateway docs, config schema, and tests.

PR surface: Source +182, Tests +291, Docs +28, Generated 0. Total +501 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: source inspection shows current main only sends non-closing pings while the PR enables close-on-timeout when config is omitted, and the config metadata gap is visible from the changed schema plus unchanged metadata tables. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer judgment on default-on fail-closed Gateway behavior plus contributor real behavior proof before any repair lane is safe.
